  "findings": [
    "Working clearance in front of panelboard is obstructed by stored material, violating NEC 110.26(A).",
    "Neutral conductors from multiple circuits are landed under a single terminal screw, violating NEC 200.4(A) (neutral identification and independent termination).",
    "Panelboard interior is covered with construction dust and debris, requiring cleanup before final inspection."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove all stored material and obstructions from the dedicated working space in front of the panelboard.",
    "Re-terminate each neutral conductor under its own dedicated terminal on the neutral bar.",
    "Thoroughly clean the panelboard interior to remove all dust, debris, and foreign material."
  ],
  "rationale": "The panelboard is mechanically installed and wired (rough-complete), but critical safety and code violations exist. Obstructed working clearance is an immediate safety hazard. Improper neutral termination is a fire and shock risk. These defects must be corrected before the installation can pass inspection.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 110.26(A) Working Space",
    "NEC 200.4(A) Installation - Neutral Conductors",
    "NEC 408.4(A) Circuit Directory or Circuit Identification"
  ]
}
